ideation: This sequence simulates a bellhop presenting a hotel key or room key. The animation starts with both arms at the sides, then moves to presenting a tray (simulated by a slight forward position of the arms), and finally returns to a neutral position. The left arm will hold the tray, so it will be less expressive than the right. The right arm will be slightly more active, mimicking a gesture of presentation or invitation.  The robot does not have hands, so the 'holding' will be simulated by positioning.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready to serve
left arm presents the key, right arm gestures invitation
arms return to rest, the task complete
